inst✝¹² : NumberField F
inst✝¹¹ : IsTotallyReal F

inst✝¹⁰ : Field E
inst✝⁹ : NumberField E
inst✝⁸ : IsTotallyReal E
inst✝⁷ : Algebra F E

inst✝⁵ : IsSolvable Gal(E/F)
p : ℕ
inst✝⁴ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
V : Type
inst✝³ : AddCommGroup V
inst✝² : Module (AlgebraicClosure ℚ_[p]) V
inst✝¹ : Module.Finite (AlgebraicClosure ℚ_[p]) V
inst✝ : Module.Free (AlgebraicClosure ℚ_[p]) V
hV : Module.finrank (AlgebraicClosure ℚ_[p]) V = 2
ρ : GaloisRep F (AlgebraicClosure ℚ_[p]) V
hρirred : (ρ.map (algebraMap F E)).IsIrreducible
hρdet :
  ∀ (g : Field.absoluteGaloisGroup F),
    ρ.det g = (algebraMap ℤ_[p] (AlgebraicClosure ℚ_[p])) ↑((cyclotomicCharacter (AlgebraicClosure F) p) g.toRingEquiv)
hρflat :
  ∃ R x x_1,
    ∃ (x_2 : IsLocalRing R) (_ : IsDomain R),
      ∃ x_4,
        ∃ (x_5 : IsTopologicalRing R) (_ : Module.Finite ℤ_[p] R) (_ : Module.Free ℤ_[p] R) (_ :
          IsModuleTopology ℤ_[p] R),
          ∃ x_9,
            ∃ (_ : IsScalarTower ℤ_[p] R (AlgebraicClosure ℚ_[p])) (x_11 : ContinuousSMul R (AlgebraicClosure ℚ_[p])),
              ∃ V₀ x_12 x_13,
                ∃ (x_14 : Module.Finite R V₀) (x_15 : Module.Free R V₀) (_ : Module.rank R V₀ = 2),
                  ∃ ρ₀ r₀,
                    (GaloisRep.baseChange (AlgebraicClosure ℚ_[p]) ρ₀).conj r₀ = ρ ∧
                      ∀ (v : HeightOneSpectrum (RingOfIntegers F)), ↑p ∈ v.asIdeal → GaloisRep.IsFlatAt v ρ₀
S : Finset (HeightOneSpectrum (RingOfIntegers F))
hS : ∀ v ∈ S, ↑p ∉ v.asIdeal
hρunram : ∀ v ∉ S, ↑p ∉ v.asIdeal → ρ.IsUnramifiedAt v
hρtame :
  ∀ w ∈ S,
    ∃ π,
      ∃ (_ : Function.Surjective ⇑π),
        ∃ δ,
          localTameAbelianInertiaGroup w ≤ δ.ker ∧
            ∀ (g : Field.absoluteGaloisGroup (HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletion F w)) (v : V),
              π (((ρ.toLocal w) g) v) = (δ g) (π v)
⊢ @GaloisRep.IsAutomorphicOfLevel F inst✝¹³ inst✝¹² inst✝¹¹ p inst✝⁴ (AlgebraicClosure ℚ_[p])
      (AlgebraicClosure.instCommRing ℚ_[p]) (PadicAlgCl.valued p).toTopologicalSpace
      (AlgebraicClosure.instAlgebra ℚ_[p]) (instContinuousSMulPadicIntAlgebraicClosurePadic p inst✝⁴) V inst✝³ inst✝²
      inst✝¹ inst✝ hV ρ S ↔
    @GaloisRep.IsAutomorphicOfLevel E inst✝¹⁰ inst✝⁹ inst✝⁸ p inst✝⁴ (AlgebraicClosure ℚ_[p])
      (AlgebraicClosure.instCommRing ℚ_[p]) (PadicAlgCl.valued p).toTopologicalSpace
      (AlgebraicClosure.instAlgebra ℚ_[p]) (instContinuousSMulPadicIntAlgebraicClosurePadic p inst✝⁴) V inst✝³ inst✝²

      (HeightOneSpectrum.preimageComapFinset (RingOfIntegers F) F E (RingOfIntegers E) S)
